/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,22003252,/CTORD:PROBATION IN # 22001600 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
